mapper.select: /* 토론 현황 조회 ForumJoinUserDAO.selectForumScoreStatus */ SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IF(T.atclCnt = 0 AND T.cmntCnt = 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS noStareCnt , IFNULL(SUM(IF(T.atclCnt > 0 OR T.cmntCnt > 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS completeCnt , IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(T.SCR)), 0) AS avgScore , IFNULL(MAX(T.SCR), 0) AS maxScore , IFNULL(MIN(T.SCR), 0) AS minScore FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID AS stdNo , IFNULL(C.SCR, 0) AS SCR , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS atclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS cmntCnt FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP AS C ON A.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND C.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' )T

/* 토론 참여 목록 조회 ForumJoinUserDAO.listPaging */ SELECT
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY userNm) AS LINE_NO
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY LENGTH(teamNm), teamNm, userNm) AS LINE_NO
, forumCd , deptNm , stdNo , userId , userNm , SCR , scoreNull , ( CASE WHEN afterAtclCnt > 0 THEN '지각참여' WHEN actlCnt > 0 THEN '참여' ELSE '미참여' END ) AS joinStatus , actlCnt , cmntCnt , userId , teamCd , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , forumFdbkCd , fdbkCts , profMemo , teamNm
, CASE WHEN memberRole = 'Y' THEN '팀장' ELSE '팀원' END AS memberRole , mutCnt , mutAvg , mutSn
, mobileNo , email , forumMyAtclCnt , forumAtclCnt , forumMyCmntCnt , forumCmntCnt , evalRsltOpenYn , evalStartDttm , evalEndDttm , SCYR , ENTR_YY , ENTR_HY , ENTR_GBN , ENTR_GBN_NM , GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM ( SELECT C.DSCS_ID AS forumCd
, U.DEPTNM AS deptNm , A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.USER_ID AS userId
, U.USERNM AS userNm , NVL((SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID), 0) AS SCR , NVL((SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID), '-') AS scoreNull , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS actlCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS cmntCnt , (SELECT NVL(USER_ID, A.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) as userId , (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID) AS teamCd , (SELECT DSCS_FDBK_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.PAR_FORUM_FDBK_CD IS NULL ORDER BY MOD_DTTM DESC LIMIT 1) AS forumFdbkCd , (SELECT FDBK_CTS FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.PAR_FORUM_FDBK_CD IS NULL ORDER BY MOD_DTTM DESC LIMIT 1) AS fdbkCts , (SELECT SCR_MEMO FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID) AS profMemo , (SELECT BB.TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM BB ON B.TEAM_ID = BB.TEAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BBB ON BB.TEAM_TYCD = BBB.TEAM_TYCD WHERE B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND BBB.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID) AS teamNm , (SELECT B.TEAM_LDRYN FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM BB ON B.TEAM_ID = BB.TEAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BBB ON BB.TEAM_TYCD = BBB.TEAM_TYCD WHERE B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND BBB.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID) AS memberRole , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL B WHERE B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID) AS mutCnt , (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(SCR)), 0) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL B WHERE B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID) AS mutAvg , (SELECT B.MTL_EVL_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND RGTR_ID = #{userId}) AS mutSn , U.MOBILE_NO AS mobileNo , U.EMAIL AS email , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AS forumMyAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS forumAtclCnt , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND AA.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM >= BB.DSCS_EDTTM ) AS afterAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AS forumMyCmntCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS forumCmntCnt , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND AA.STD_ID = U.USER_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM >= BB.DSCS_EDTTM ) AS afterCmntCnt , (SELECT EVL_RSLT_OYN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS evalRsltOpenYn , (SELECT EVL_SDTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS evalStartDttm , (SELECT EVL_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS evalEndDttm , IFNULL(A.SCYR,'-') SCYR , IFNULL(U.ENTR_YY,'-') ENTR_YY , IFNULL(U.ENTR_HY,'-') ENTR_HY , IFNULL(U.ENTR_GBN,'-') ENTR_GBN , IFNULL(U.ENTR_GBN_NM,'-') ENTR_GBN_NM , A.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = A.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS A
JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS AS C
ON C.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USR U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND A.STD_ID IN ( SELECT D.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE D JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC E ON D.EXAM_ID = E.EXAM_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND E.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = #{forumCd} AND D.REEXAMYN = 'Y' )
) T WHERE 1 = 1
AND actlCnt > 0 AND afterAtclCnt = 0
AND actlCnt = 0
AND afterAtclCnt > 0
AND T.memberRole = 'Y'
AND T.memberRole != 'Y'
AND T.scoreNull != '-'
AND T.scoreNull = '-'
AND ( LOWER(deptNm) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(userId) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(userNm) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY lineNo ASC
mapper.insert:
/* 토론 참여 점수 반영 ForumJoinUserDAO.insertStdScore */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP T USING ( SELECT
#{stdNo} AS STD_ID
FN_GET_STD_NO(#{userId}, #{crsCreCd}) AS STD_ID
, #{forumCd} AS DSCS_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.STD_ID = S.STD_ID AND T.DSCS_ID = S.DSCS_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.SCR = CASE WHEN CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) < 0 THEN 0 WHEN CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) > 100 THEN 100 ELSE CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) END, T.TEAM_ID = #{teamCd}, T.EVLYN = 'Y', T.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, T.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( STD_ID, DSCS_ID, TEAM_ID, SCR, EVLYN, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, DELYN ) VALUES (
#{stdNo}
FN_GET_STD_NO(#{userId}, #{crsCreCd})
, #{forumCd}, #{teamCd}, CASE WHEN CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) < 0 THEN 0 WHEN CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) > 100 THEN 100 ELSE CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) END, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, FN_DTTM(), #{mdfrId}, FN_DTTM(), 'N' )
mapper.select: /* 토론 참여 정보 조회 ForumJoinUserDAO.selectForumJoinUser */ SELECT STD_ID AS stdNo , DSCS_ID AS forumCd , SCR AS SCR , EVLYN AS evalYn , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , DELYN AS delYn , ( SELECT B.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT AS B WHERE B.USER_ID = (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS C WHERE C.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS userId , ( SELECT B.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT AS B WHERE B.USER_ID = (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS C WHERE C.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS userId , ( SELECT B.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR B WHERE B.USER_ID = (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS C WHERE C.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS userNm , ( SELECT B.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR B WHERE B.USER_ID = (SELECT C.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS C WHERE C.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS deptNm ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN ='N' AND B.STD_ID = A.DSCS_ID) AS atclCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN ='N' AND B.STD_ID = A.DSCS_ID) AS cmntCnt ,(SELECT MTL_EVLYN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AS mutEvalYn ,(SELECT IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(SCR)), 0) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID) AS mutAvg FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP AS A WHERE STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}

/* 수강생 토론 성적 조회 ForumJoinUserDAO.forumJoinUserList */ SELECT U.STD_ID AS stdNo , DSCS_ID AS forumCd , IFNULL(SCR, 0) AS SCR , EVLYN AS evalYn , U.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , U.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , U.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , U.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , U.DELYN AS delYn , (SELECT IFNULL(USER_ID, S.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = S.USER_ID) AS userId FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP U, TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S WHERE U.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND U.STD_ID = S.STD_ID AND S.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S'

/* 교수 메모 팝업창 정보 ForumJoinUserDAO.selectProfMemo */ SELECT ( SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS deptNm , ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS userId , ( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) ) AS userNm , NVL(A.SCR, 0) AS SCR , B.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , B.DSCS_TTL AS forumTitle , B.DSCS_SDTTM AS forumStartDttm , B.DSCS_EDTTM AS forumEndDttm , A.SCR_MEMO AS profMemo FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}
